entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation_AttributeSync_TransformationRule_Test Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE IdentityEntitlement PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <IdentityEntitlement aggregationState="Disconnected" assigned="true" assigner="The Administrator" assignmentId="bbfe94d4dd564aa7a01f4a2f71d6bf96" created="1719331711939" id="c0a8001a904f147e81905027ebc3018d" modified="1760082180427" name="groups" nativeIdentity="cn=abdul.samad,ou=People,dc=my-domain,dc=com" significantModified="1760082180427" source="LCM" type="Entitlement" value="cn=Contractors,ou=Group,dc=my-domain,dc=com"> <ApplicationRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Application" id="LDAPApplication" name="LDAPApplication"/> </ApplicationRef> <CurrentCertificationItem> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.CertificationItem" id="a9feffec96f31fd981970ada8a6b17b5"/> </CurrentCertificationItem> <IdentityRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Identity" id="Abdul samad" name="Abdul samad"/> </IdentityRef> <CurrentRequestItem> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.IdentityRequestItem" id="groups"/> </CurrentRequestItem> </IdentityEntitlement>
